creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text: Just wanted to share another success story with Liberfeel-Y7 minispeaker on Lenovo L470 laptop with internal BT adapter (0x0a2b).  First had to install the firmware as described at https://www.davidschlachter.com/misc/freebsd-intel-8265-bluetooth and restarted the Bluetooth service twice (sic), then followed instructions in comment #3 (except that `audio/virtual_oss' is in the ports now) and voila.
